title: SC3-Eval: Evaluating Robot Foundation Models via Self-Consistent Video Generation
summary: SC3-Eval adapts pre-trained robot video foundation models into policy evaluators by enforcing three types of consistency: forward-inverse dynamics consistency, cross-view consistency, and test-time consistency. The method addresses error accumulation in rollouts, multi-camera consistency, and generalization to unseen policy behaviors. Evaluated across seven real-world VLA policies, it achieves a closed-loop Pearson correlation of 0.929 and MMRV of 0.119, and reproduces actual failure modes observed in physical robot rollouts.
